query:
SELECT DATE(createdAt) as signup_date, COUNT(*) as signups FROM users WHERE createdAt >= '2026-04-25' GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY signup_date DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users, MAX(createdAt) as last_signup FROM users;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as signup_date, COUNT(*) as signups FROM users WHERE createdAt >= '2026-04-25' GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY signup_date DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users, MAX(createdAt) as last_signup FROM users;
